# Overview {#overview}

## **Theme / Setting / Genre** {#theme-/-setting-/-genre}

	\- Tactical, Turn-based, arena battler.

## **Core Gameplay Mechanics**  {#core-gameplay-mechanics}

	\- Unlock units  
	\- Create army  
	\- Battle enemy  
	\- Get rewards and everlasting glory

## **Targeted platforms** {#targeted-platforms}

	\- PC (Windows / Linux)  
	\- Mobile (Android)

## **Monetization model (Brief/Document)**  {#monetization-model-(brief/document)}

\- Microtransactions (limited), Premium (Ad Remover), Mobile ads

	*\- \<Link to Monetization Document\>*   
*(How do you plan to monetize the game?)*

## **Marketing and community model (Brief/Document)**

	*\- \<Link to Marketing Document\>*   
*(How do you plan to monetize the game?)*

## **Project Scope**  {#project-scope}

	\- Game Scale  
		\- 30 000 €   
\- 2 years till mobile launch  
\- Team Structure  
	\- Core Team  
\- Piotr Musielski  
Responsibilities: PR & Community, 2D design, programming, content creator, balancing.  
\- Wojciech Lesisz  
Responsibilities: Main programmer, 3D & animation design, content creator, balancing.

	\-  Playfab, Server, Visual Studio  
	\- \<Total Costs with breakdown\>

## **Influences**  {#influences}

### 	**\- Heroes of Might and Magic 3**

		\- Hex,turn based battle model.  
\- Initial source of Retsot idea.

### 	**\- Warhammer 40k**

		\- Limited- point recruiting system  
		\- Defining how army is build.

### 	**\- League of Legends**

		\- Skills and abilities model.  
\- Differentiating from homm3 spell system

## 

## **The elevator Pitch** {#the-elevator-pitch}

Retsot arena is an online, tactical, turn-based, strategic battle arena.  
Requires creativity, thinking and analytical skills. We call it chess of video-gaming industry. We want to keep the game in strongly community \-involved and \-engaged by making accessible and friendly discord server with active admins\!

## **Project Description (Brief):** {#project-description-(brief):}

The battle system is a combination of heroes 3 battle with added unique abilities mechanics known from mmo games. Player recruits army in advance, with defined amount of points (like in WH:40k), and enters the battlezone with enemy, fighting in turn-based mode.

## **![][image2]**

## **Project Description (Detailed)**

*\<Four Paragraphs or more If needs be\>*  
*\<No more than six paragraphs\>*

# What sets this project apart? {#what-sets-this-project-apart?}

	\- Old turn based battle system with modern skill sets  
	\- Community oriented (Discord, suggestions, active developers)

## **Core Gameplay Mechanics (Detailed)** {#core-gameplay-mechanics-(detailed)}

### 	**\- Unlocking new units**

		\- Units that can be used in army have to be unlocked first.  
 	Units are split into factions and have unique abilities and statistics.  
		This is the element that will lead people to ‘grind’ the game.

\- Units can be unlocked in shop via Virtual currency (Toster Coins)  obtained by playing the game or paid microtransactions.

### 	**\- Generating army**

	\- Army is a set of units that player takes to the battlefield.

	\- Player builds his army with limited resources i.e. 50 000 army points, from his unlocked units. Army can be saved, loaded, exported externally (stored online).

### 	**\- Battle phase**

		\- Two players enter a hex-based battlefield with their armies.   
Each unit is controlled separately in turn-based pattern. Units with higher initiative are to move before those with lower.

### 	**\- Player Statistics**

	\- After the battle player is rewarded Experience, Toster Coins, Wins/Loses statistics. Leveling up will grant Toster Coins and/or possibility to unlock new unit / faction/  
\- Statistics are stored online via PlayFab system. *And possibly accessible to discord bot at game server.*

# Story and Gameplay {#story-and-gameplay}

## **Story (Brief)**  {#story-(brief)}

Barbarians (barbarians) are attacking city and the forest around it.  
City (golems) tries to defend from barbarians.  
Forest (lizards)  try to defend from barbarians and City from stealing resources.  
Mystic creatures (shadows) hidden in forest shadow are awaken and seek for revenge.

![][image3]

## 

## **Story (Detailed)** {#story-(detailed)}

*Kraina Retsot \- ogromny głęboki las, nigdy nie zbadany. W jego środku żyją długowieczne istoty jaszczuropodobne, czuwający nad harmonią oraz energią voodoo.*  
*Na skraju którego znajduje się miasto \- fortyfikacja.*   
*W nim żyją spokojnie ludzie.*  
*Miastem zarządza i panuje dwóch magów.*  
*Zbliża się inwazja barbarzyńców.*  
*Magowie postanawiają się przygotować do inwazji.*  
*Jeden z nich tworzy magiczne kreatury z leśnych zasobów oraz magii żywiołów.*  
*Drugi wyrusza do lasu w poszukiwaniu magicznej rośliny która da mu potężną moc.*  
*W środku lasu zostaje opętany przez prastarego demona cieni, który mógł opętać tylko osobę o wykształceniu magicznym, a nie istotę starożytną.*  
*Demon więzi maga i z wykorzystaniem jego mocy tworzy kolejne demony cieni.*  
*Cienie atakują wioskę, zabijając jej mieszkańców, a każdego z nich zamieniając w kolejny cień.*  
*Jaszczury zaczynają się zbroić. Walczą z cieniami, które zaburzają harmonię lasu, próbują powstrzymać maga z miasta przed całkowitą eksploatacją zasobów lasu oraz zakłócaniem energii voodoo, a do tego muszą powstrzymać napady barbarzyńców.*  
*Mag próbuje powstrzymać napad barbarzyńców, bronić resztki mieszkańców przed cieniami oraz toczy spór o zasoby lasu z jaszczurami.*

\--------------------------------

Retsot is a deep, dark and uncharted forest.   
It’s inhabitants \- mythical, thousand years old reptiles are living peacefully with the laws of nature. Living in shadows of enormous trees and unknown magical plants.  
It’s neighbours \- humans ruled by two brothers, who are powerful mages,  
are living in a fortified town. They are trading forest’s goods to building their economical power.  
However one day, the peace is broken by nomad warriors \- Barbarians, who think only about conquering and destroying whatever they meet on their way. They do not respect any law and believe in brute power.  
This time they are invading Retsot castle to plounder its gold and burning the surrounding forests.  
City has to defend themself with all the goods they have. They start exploiting forest for it’s magical resources, so older brother can summon golems and creatures to protect their society.  Younger one, who was always less responsible sets out on mission to find the legendary plant, that will give him supernatural powers of controlling the forest environment \- the only way to win this brutal war. He enters the darkest of the darkest parts of forest, where even reptiles are too scared to explore. And there… He gets possessed by a shadow demon, waiting there for thousands of years to find a human body that will allow him to control shadows of forest and create shadow empire to set the whole world on infinite darkness.

# Assets Needed {#assets-needed}

## **\- 2D** {#--2d}

	\- Units textures  
	\- UI graphics (Abilities, units, shop icons and general UI design) 

## **\- 3D** {#--3d}

	\- Characters   
		\- Lizards (4)       	(general concept)  
		\- Barbarians (4) 	(already concepted)  
		\- Golems (4)   	(already concepted and working)  
		\- Shadows (4) 	(from scratch, soon TM)  
	\- Environmental  
		\- Environmental addons \- d

## **\- Sound** {#--sound}

	\- SFX: Abilities, movement, UI 		(total \~60 sfx’s)   
\- Music: UI, Battleground 		(total \~5-10 compositions)  
\- Voice acting: unit sentences		(\~60 short sentences)

## **\- Code** {#--code}

	\- Multiplayer scripts 			(lobby, statistics, shop)  
	\- Battle mechanics 			(abilities, movement, spawn)  
\- UI scripts 					(recruiting, shop)  
\- AI scripts  

## **\- Animation** {#--animation}

	\- Units \- movement, abilities, idle.	(\~60 animations)  
	\- UI animations 				(\~20 animations)

# Schedule {#schedule}

### **\- Working prototype** 

		\- Q4 2019 (late)  
			\- Matchmaking 	✔️  
			\- Battle system	✔️  
			\- Balancing 		✔️  
			\- No bugs, desync issues etc. X

### 	**\- Initial (alpha) tests** 

		\- Q1 2020 (early)  
			\- Get 20 test players ✔️  
			\- Balancing

### 	**\- Invitational (beta) tests**

		\- Q3 2020 (early)  
			\- Obtaining new graphics, sfx, sound, UI   
			\- Get 100 invitational players  
			\- Balancing, adding new content  
\- Preparing marketing and monetization plan  
\- Start working at mobile version

### 	**\- Release**

		\- Q1 2021 (late)  
			\- Release game for 1000 unique players  
			\- Building discord community   
			\- Applying monetization plan

### **\-Expansion**

		\- Q2 2021 (late)  
\- Applying marketing plan  
			\- Maintaining community 			

### 	**\- Monetization & Mobile**

		\- Q4 2021 (late)  
\- Focus on mobile monetization  
\- Maintenance, content creation
